app.lock.subtitle: The key is derived with PBKDF2 and data is encrypted with AES-GCM in localStorage. Auto-lock on inactivity.
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Everything is encrypted and stored locally. No cloud or accounts: your data never leaves the device.
onboarding.dashboardDesc: Quick overview of your status: vault integrity, access counts, and shortcuts to key sections.
onboarding.passwordsOverviewDesc: Manage everything in one place: search, filters, folders, the list, and the detail panel side by side.
onboarding.searchDesc: Search by name, user, email, URL, or folder. Shortcut: Ctrl+F. Clear with the X to start over.
onboarding.filtersDesc: Strength (strong/medium/weak), without 2FA, duplicates, and date range (created/updated) to narrow results fast.
onboarding.addButtonDesc: Quick button to add a new entry from any folder. You can also use the Ctrl+N shortcut.
onboarding.listDesc: Grouped by folder, drag to reorder or move entries; shows name, user/email, and counts per folder.
onboarding.detailDesc: View/copy password, edit fields (user, email, URLs, folder, 2FA), version history, and delete/restore actions.
onboarding.generatorDesc: Create strong passwords on the fly. Open it from the sidebar or with Ctrl+G.
onboarding.addFormDesc: Here you enter the service/app details: name, folder, user/email, URLs, 2FA and the password before saving.
onboarding.healthDesc: See strength, character variety, 2FA status, and detect duplicate or weak passwords in the Health panel.
onboarding.settingsDesc: Language, export/import, version history retention, and vault security options.
onboarding.shortcutsDesc: Ctrl+N new password • Ctrl+F search • Ctrl+G generator • Ctrl+L lock.
onboarding.revisitDesc: You can restart the tour anytime from the sidebar (Quick Tour button).
dashboard.title: Welcome to KeyPing
dashboard.subtitle: Local, offline password hygiene. No cloud, no accounts.
generator.title: Password generator
add.title: Add password
add.subtitle: Store patterns and metadata locally. No cloud, no autofill.
passwords.title: Your passwords
passwords.subtitle: Manage and edit stored entries.
passwords.search.placeholder: Search by name, user, email, URL or folder...
passwords.filters.title: Filters
passwords.filters.subtitle: Combine criteria to narrow the list.
passwords.empty.title: You haven't saved any passwords yet.
passwords.empty.hint: Start by tapping the + Add button above.
passwords.empty.demo: Preview with sample entries so you can see how info is organized.
passwords.list.title: List
passwords.detail.note: The password is stored encrypted in the vault and only decrypted when shown here.
passwords.history.title: Password history
passwords.history.confirmClear: Remove all historic versions and keep only the current one?
passwords.history.modal.title: Full history
passwords.history.modal.subtitle: {{count}} saved versions
passwords.detail.noUrls: You haven't saved URLs for this service.
passwords.summary.title: Security summary
passwords.confirm.delete: Delete this password from the list? Historical pattern stays for similarity checks.
passwords.folder.deleteConfirm: Delete the folder "{{folder}}" and move items to "{{target}}"?
health.title: Password Health
health.subtitle: Overall health of your saved passwords: strength, duplicates, length and 2FA.
health.score.cardHelp: Security score based on strength, length, duplicates and 2FA
health.score.penalties: Penalties: weak, short, low variety, no 2FA, duplicates.
health.totals.title: Totals
health.strength.title: Strength
health.alerts.title: Alerts
health.issues.help: Passwords sorted by highest risk first
health.issues.title: Problematic passwords
health.issues.subtitle: Sorted by severity (duplicates, short, low variety, no 2FA).
health.dups.title: Duplicates
health.demo.score: Example score combining strength, length, duplicates, and 2FA.
health.demo.totals: Demo summary with duplicated, no-2FA, and short samples.
health.demo.strength: Example distribution: strong, medium, and weak.
health.demo.alerts: Demo alerts for low variety, no 2FA, and weak passwords.
health.demo.issues: Issues ordered by severity to illustrate the list.
health.demo.dups: Repeated values showing how duplicates are grouped.
settings.header.title: Configuration
settings.header.subtitle: Adjust security, preferences and vault backups.
settings.security.title: Vault protection
settings.security.subtitle: Change master password, adjust auto-lock and limit failed attempts.
settings.master.title: Change master password
settings.master.subtitle: The key never leaves your device. Re-encrypts the existing vault.
settings.master.note: You will need to unlock again after changing.
settings.master.error.min: The new password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.master.error.invalid: Current password is incorrect or temporarily locked.
settings.master.success: Master password updated. Vault locked to re-enter with the new key.
settings.autolock.title: Auto-lock time
settings.autolock.subtitle: Define how many minutes of inactivity close the vault.
settings.autolock.saved: Auto-lock set to {{value}} minutes of inactivity.
settings.attempts.title: Failed attempts and delay
settings.attempts.subtitle: 3 free attempts, then exponential backoff.
settings.attempts.note: Delay grows exponentially after free attempts are used.
settings.attempts.saved: Free attempts: {{free}}. Then initial delay {{delay}}s growing x{{growth}}.
settings.pref.title: Language and experience
settings.pref.subtitle: Settings that affect the local UI.
settings.language.title: Language selection
settings.language.subtitle: Applies only to the UI. No data leaves the device.
settings.language.enDesc: Ideal if you mix apps in English.
settings.backup.title: Vault Export / Import
settings.backup.subtitle: Export encrypted or import with overwrite or assisted merge.
settings.history.title: Password history
settings.history.subtitle: Control how many versions are kept in the vault.
settings.history.limitHint: Older versions beyond this limit are purged automatically.
settings.export.title: Export encrypted vault
settings.export.subtitle: Generate an encrypted file with your master key.
settings.export.hint: Great for secure backups or migrating devices.
settings.export.includeHistoryHint: Uncheck to export only the current version of each entry.
settings.export.success: Vault exported and encrypted with your password.
settings.export.modal.title: Export vault
settings.export.modal.subtitle: Confirm with your master password to generate the encrypted backup.
settings.export.modal.label: Master password
settings.export.modal.placeholder: You will need this password when importing
settings.import.title: Import vault
settings.import.subtitle: Two modes: overwrite everything or merge selecting what to keep.
settings.import.overwrite.title: Overwrite all
settings.import.merge.title: Assisted merge
settings.import.merge.desc: Choose new passwords to keep or discard.
settings.import.search: Search by name, username or email
settings.import.note: Import will be applied on confirmation.
settings.import.confirmOverwrite.title: Overwrite vault
settings.import.confirmMerge.title: Confirm merge
settings.import.confirmOverwrite.desc: Current data will be deleted and replaced by the backup. This cannot be undone.
settings.import.confirmMerge.desc: We will apply the merge with the selected entries.
settings.import.msg.encrypted: Encrypted file: enter the password used when exporting.
settings.import.msg.readyOverwrite: File ready. The current vault will be overwritten.
settings.import.msg.emptyFile: No passwords found in the file.
settings.import.msg.readError: Could not read the file. Make sure it is the generated import file.
settings.import.msg.unlockError: Could not decrypt the backup. Check the password.
settings.import.msg.mergeEmpty: Load a file to choose what to merge.
settings.import.msg.mergeSelected: You will merge {{count}} passwords from the imported file.
settings.import.msg.needFile: Select a file to overwrite the vault.
settings.import.msg.masterHint: Enter the password and click "Unlock backup" to preview.
settings.tip.label: Label
